financials.role: financial statement cross-check candidate; not valuation SSOT

overview.description: Visa Inc. operates as a payment technology company in the United States and internationally. The company operates VisaNet, a transaction processing network that enables authorization, clearing, and settlement of payment transactions. It also offers credit, debit, and prepaid card products; tap to pay, tokenization, and click to pay services; Visa Direct, a platform which facilitates money movement, enabling clients to collect, hold, convert, and send funds across its network; and issuing solutions, such as airport lounge access, dining reservat...
overview.financialIntro: In fiscal year 2025, Visa's revenue was $40.00 billion, an increase of 11.34% compared to the previous year's $35.93 billion. Earnings were $19.85 billion, an increase of 2.04%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 41 analysts, the average rating for V stock is "Strong Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $401.16, which is an increase of 15.43% from the latest price.
